name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Ogden Utah?

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken arm from work worth in Ogden Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: Value based on medical bills, lost wages (2/3 typically), permanent impairment; no cap on medical.[2] Settlements vary widely.[2] Key factors: Disability rating, future care needs.[2] Use lawyer for accurate calc; avoid lowball offers.[2] Comp covers basics without proving fault.[1]
